title: Neo AE2 Toogleable View Cell
description: Neoforge 1.21.1 AE2 Toogleable View Cell ,  a mod that adds a toggleable view cell to AE2
body:
# Neo AE2 Toogleable View Cell

This mod is a NeoForge version of [AE2 Toogleable View Cell](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2-toggleable-viewcell) and follows the MIT license.

This mod is a simple addon for AE2 that adds toggleable View Cells.

![the example ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e435b23f322583abd8cfda31199486af3ac7cab.gif)

# About screen

There is something wrong that the view cell slots can not directly displaying in 1.21.1AE2.

The example used [AE Terminal View Cell Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/terminal-view-cell-fix) to fix it

 

# Texture License

The textures used in this mod are derived from resources available in the Applied Energistics 2 repository, specifically from the branch, and are licensed under CC BY-NC-SA 3.0.
